description_long: This object consists of five rectangular packages of UltraFresh Ultra Thin baby dry diapers, stacked in a staggered arrangement. Each package is wrapped in a smooth, semi-glossy plastic material and features colorful branding with a cartoon baby illustration on the front. The packages are labeled with different sizes (S, M, L, XL, XXL) and each contains 30 diapers, as indicated by the printed text. The dominant colors are white, with accents of green, blue, pink, orange, and purple corresponding to the size labels. The packages appear soft and slightly rounded at the edges, suggesting a compressible, cushiony interior. The branding and product information are clearly visible on the front-facing surfaces.
description: A stack of five UltraFresh Ultra Thin baby diaper packages, each with colorful branding and a cartoon baby illustration, wrapped in smooth plastic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the staggered stack of five diaper packages, with only the side edges and some color accents visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five UltraFresh diaper packages, with clear visibility of the branding, size labels, and cartoon baby illustrations.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the rounded edges and colored side panels of the stacked packages.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing the branding and size labels on the packages, with a clear view of the stack's arrangement.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'UltraFresh' brand name is prominently printed in large blue and green letters on the front of each package, accompanied by a small red swoosh logo in the top left corner.
attribute_fastening_type: Not visible; typical baby diapers use adhesive tape fasteners, but the packaging does not display the fastening mechanism.
attribute_absorbent_core_pattern: Not visible from the exterior; packaging suggests a uniform or channel-patterned absorbent core typical of modern diapers.
attribute_elastic_waistband_design: Not visible; the packaging does not reveal the waistband design.
